task_completion.description: Verify that the required layers are created with the correct colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Layer List panel in LibreCAD. You should see layers named BOUNDARY (White/Black depending on theme), BEDS (Green), WALKWAYS (Yellow), FOUNTAIN (Cyan), and DIMENSIONS (Red).

task_completion.description: Verify the boundary rectangle is drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a large outer rectangle (drawn in white/black) in the main drawing area representing the 12x9 boundary.

task_completion.description: Verify the cross-axis walkways are drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for yellow lines forming a cross shape (two vertical lines and two horizontal lines) that span across the boundary rectangle.

task_completion.description: Verify the central elliptical bed and fountain are drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green ellipse in the center of the drawing. Inside the center of this ellipse, there should be a smaller cyan circle representing the fountain.

task_completion.description: Verify the four circular corner beds are drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for four green circles positioned symmetrically in the four corners/quadrants of the boundary rectangle.
Look for red dimension lines and text indicating the boundary width (12), boundary height (9), and the major axis of the central ellipse.

task_completion.description: Verify the drawing is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the LibreCAD window title bar or a file manager window to confirm the file is saved as 'garden_layout.dxf' in the '~/Documents/LibreCAD/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreCAD interface with active drawing tools, command line history, or layer management, rather than just terminal commands executing a script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a Python script or external tool to generate the DXF file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show the execution of scripts (e.g., Python scripts using ezdxf) to bypass manual GUI interaction.

integrity.description: Verify the drawing is actually rendered in the LibreCAD canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: The drawing should appear on the LibreCAD grid with standard CAD crosshairs, selection handles, or drafting aids visible, not as an imported image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The drawing must contain 5 specific layers: BOUNDARY (White), BEDS (Green), WALKWAYS (Yellow), FOUNTAIN (Cyan), and DIMENSIONS (Red). The boundary is a 12x9 rectangle. The central ellipse is at (6, 4.5) with a major radius of 3.0 and minor radius of 1.8. The fountain is a circle at (6, 4.5) with a radius of 0.45. There are four corner circles, each with a radius of 0.9, centered at (2,2), (10,2), (2,7), and (10,7). Walkways are 1.2m wide, defined by lines at X=5.4, X=6.6, Y=3.9, and Y=5.1. Dimensions must show 12, 9, and the ellipse major axis. The final file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/garden_layout.dxf.
